overview.text: St John Ambulance NSW is a volunteer first-aid charity. In NSW, primary emergency ambulance services are provided by NSW Ambulance — St John's role is community first-aid, event medical coverage, training and youth (Cadet) programs.

items: Different from St John Ambulance WA / NT — those subdivisions are the primary EMS in those jurisdictions.
In NSW, St John volunteers are commonly seen at sporting events, festivals and shows providing on-site first aid.
Coordination with NSW Ambulance occurs on event-specific liaison talkgroups.
